<header>
  <div class="logo-area">
    <a href="$home$index_page">
      <img src="$logo_image_url" class="header-logo" alt="$<project_name>" />
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="brand">$<project_name></div>

  <nav class="mainmenu" title="Main Menu">
    <th1>
      builtin_request_js hbmenu.js
      html "<button id=\"hbbtn\" class=\"hbbtn\" type=\"button\" aria-label=\"Site Map\">"
      html "<svg width=\"18\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 18 14\" fill=\"none\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">"
      html "<path d=\"M1 1h16M1 7h16M1 13h16\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>"
      html "</svg></button>\n"
      foreach {name url expr class} $mainmenu {
        if {![capexpr $expr]} continue
        if {[string match /* $url]} {
          if {[string match $url\[/?#\]* /$current_page/]} {
            set class "active $class"
          }
          set url $home$url
        }
        html "<a href=\"$url\" class=\"$class\">$name</a>\n"
      }
    </th1>
  </nav>

  <div class="status">
    <th1>
      if {[info exists login]} {
        html "<span class=\"status-user\">"
        puts $login
        html "</span>"
      } else {
        html "<span class=\"status-user\">guest</span>"
      }
    </th1>
  </div>
</header>

<nav class="hbdrop" id="hbdrop"></nav>

<div class="breadcrumb-bar">
  <nav class="crumbs" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
    <a href="$home$index_page">Home</a>
    <span class="crumb-sep">/</span>
    <span class="crumb-current">$<title></span>
  </nav>
  <div class="crumb-actions">
    <a href="$home/reports">Reports</a>
    <a href="$home/search">Search</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content">
